README.md:17:Specifically, we train two 3B models (masked and uniform diffusion) as well as a 10B parameter uniform diffusion model, which, to the best of our knowledge, is the largest public uniform diffusion model to date.
README.md:18:Below we plot the compute-bound and token-bound scaling laws for all investigated noise types with the scaled-up runs (3B and 10B) overlayed as circles.
README.md:24:| `gidd-unif-10b` | 10B | 9.15 | uniform | https://huggingface.co/dvruette/gidd-unif-10b |
README.md:25:| `gidd-mask-3b` | 3B | 11.3 | masked | https://huggingface.co/dvruette/gidd-mask-3b |
README.md:26:| `gidd-unif-3b` | 3B | 11.7 | uniform | https://huggingface.co/dvruette/gidd-unif-3b |
README.md:30:The 3B and 10B models are available as converted PyTorch models on HuggingFace and can be used as follows:
